title: A German site
wikitext:
[]: A German site..             Quote Post by Dr. Strangelove » Sun Jul 02, 2006 11:11 pm Anyone got the link to a German Evangelion website? It's an awesome site, kick-ass Sachiel-ish layout...trying to find it..

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Sun Jul 02, 2006 11:19 pm The only German Eva site I know of worth mentioning is Eva Armageddon. It has the angel mask thing on it, but it's not Sachiel, just a generic one from the OP. http://www.eva-armageddon.com/

[]:             Quote Post by Dr. Strangelove » Sun Jul 02, 2006 11:26 pm SIEG HEIL MEIN FUHRER! *praises*

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Sun Jul 02, 2006 11:27 pm So I take it that's the one eh? Glad to be of service.

[]:             Quote Post by Hyper Shinchan » Fri Jul 07, 2006 5:08 am It' sone of the best webiste of eva in the web (but I don't check it from a long time). Too bad that I don't speak german (but I've also corrected a mistake in a description of the video gallery a lot of months ago).
